race.description: Corbett Civil The Big Super Showcase Mdn Plate
race.comment: BY THE WAY (5) is back for a second campaign after a five-month lay-off. Started favourite at both runs in the maiden campaign, the best effort a closing third over a similar trip to this at the Gold Coast on debut. Has the ability to play a key role. SHE'S A DAME (13) raced exclusively at the provincials last prep and was competitive each time she went around. Has been in the money at all three first-up runs so she must be respected coming off an 11-week break. The Matt Dunn-trained ZALIQUE (16) returns after a 193-day spell. Two runs in the maiden prep were just fair but his trial form in preparation for today's return has been outstanding. Looks to be in for a bright campaign. Recent Sunshine Coast trial inner FIERY LASS (7) resumes. Opened last prep with a placing at Kembla so expect her to be competitive here. JENNIBELLE (9) is back after a 15-week lay-off. All four runs in the maiden prep were sound efforts. Must be considered coming out of the inside alley.
